programme.title: Speed (1994)
programme.desc: An LAPD cop discovers a psychotic criminal has planted a bomb on a crowded bus, primed to go off if the vehicle drops below 50mph. He boards the vehicle and helps a hapless passenger who has been forced to take the wheel and keep a constant speed to avoid a disaster. Action thriller, starring Keanu Reeves, Sandra Bullock, Dennis Hopper and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer must save his marriage after a disastrous lunch date at Swankyfish, and tries to prove to Marge just how much she means to him by helping around the house. Meanwhile, Milhouse acts like a bad boy to impress Lisa. Featuring the guest voices of Breaking Bads Bryan Cranston and Aaron Paul

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to astronaut Tim Peake, in a highlight from Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Birmingham compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Helen and her husband Lorne, who aim to channel their 24 years together into a safe, solid menu. However, lovebirds Ciaran and Anita criticise the food for lacking passion, and try to spice things up. Meanwhile, Rob is so entranced by his Lithuanian wife Egle that he regularly feels the need to pinch himself whenever he looks at her

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect advises more people make their period homes fit for modern life. In Clapham, south London, Masum and Marias Victorian terraced home is no longer working for the three generations of family living there. George also travels to Hove to meet Louis and Sarah, who are tackling the upstairs of their 16th-century gatehouse

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. A glamorous TV executive makes Sam an offer he cannot refuse, but Diane points out there are certain strings attached

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: As Sam and Diane finally get together, their bar-room pals grow increasingly pessimistic about the relationship. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff falls head over heels for Carlas not-so-innocent little sister, and it is up to the gang to tell him the truth about her. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tires of having to deal with Rays interfering mother, grumpy father and resentful brother, who constantly show up out of the blue, and a white lie has embarrassing consequences. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra sees newlywed friends making a public display of affection, and cannot help wondering why Raymond has so much trouble telling her he loves her. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gives the eulogy at a family funeral, but his Aunt Alda spoils the solemnity of the event by rekindling a seven-year-old feud with his mother. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Jean Stapleton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes his teenage son Frederick on a camping trip with Martin in a bid to rebuild their relationship. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After relying on the American Automobile Association one time too many, Frasier and Niles take a car maintenance class, but soon find themselves in trouble when their lack of mechanical skill prompts them to act like unruly child. Meanwhile, Martin takes over the training when Roz gets Alice a puppy

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The brothers agree to produce a one-man show for a washed-up Shakespearean actor they idolised as children, but discover his talent has completely deserted him, and set out to save face with a spot of kidnapping. With guest stars Derek Jacobi and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: Annie (2014)
programme.desc: A businessman running for mayor of New York saves the life of an orphan, and invites her to live with him as a publicity stunt. The tycoons cynical nature is chipped away at by the youngsters sunny disposition. Meanwhile, her cruel foster mother hatches a kidnapping plot. Musical remake, starring Quvenzhane Wallis, Jamie Foxx, Cameron Diaz and Rose Byrne

programme.title: Womens FA Cup
programme.desc: Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur (Kick-off 1.30pm). Jill Scott is joined by Maisie Adam to present live coverage of the quarter-final at Kingsmeadow. Chelsea will go into this tie as strong favourites, having won the last 13 Womens Super League matches between the sides and lifted this trophy last term, but Spurs are enjoying a good season so far and will be looking for an upset

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps Maria, who works in administration, and Paul, a retired police officer, who have been holidaying in southern Spain regularly to escape the English winters. Now, they want to find a property that feels like a home away from home among the countryside and traditional pueblos blancos of Andalusia

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Documentary following British families as they renovate French chateaux. At Château de la Boutinière, Alison and Zion race to restore a chapel thats lain untouched for 30 years in time for a couples 60th anniversary celebrations. At Château de Montespieu, newbies Louisa and Roger take on a bold revival of their towering six-turreted home

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With so many delays to the renovation, Jasmine and Jon need an architect to advise them on what they can and cant do. Now that Jon is able to work on the build again, he attempts to fix the swimming pool - with mixed success. But even with everyone rolling up their sleeves, theyll need more help if theres any chance of being ready for their summer deadline

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.sub-title: Brilliant Builds: Storage Hacks and Smart Spends
programme.desc: Stoke couple Julie and Allen cannot agree on any of the houses they have viewed together, but they are also at a loss as to how they can make their current three-bedroom abode any better. In Newcastle, GP Kathleen and her anaesthetist husband Tom have a three-bedroom Victorian semi in disorganised chaos with Toms sporting gear taking root everywhere. Should they move on or reconfigure the downstairs?

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Puppies Poppy and Fizz struggle with kennel life and may need to be separated if they hope to find a new home. Moose the Staffy might be more than most families can handle

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 76-year-old man sustains a head injury after falling down some stairs, and his daughter reflects on how his caring for her mother through her dementia has left him exhausted. A five-year-old girl is brought into the paediatric department with a large splinter lodged in her bottom, and a patient has a lump on her shoulder that has developed since having a fall five weeks ago

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The final five players embark on their most important hunt yet. With one player still reeling from losing their last remaining ally, rivalries are at an all-time high and the last two Predators are determined to guarantee their place in the final. But as the Prey desperately try to evade capture, a last-minute move threatens one players place in the contest

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood are joined in the tent by Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson. The celebrity bakers must make mini rolls and syrup sponge puddings, and recreate the most iconic outfits theyve ever worn in choux form

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on the Eurovision Song Contest, Faking It, Virgin Island, The Four Seasons, Night Coppers, Inside Our Minds, Naked and Afraid, and Prue Leiths Cotswold Kitchen

programme.title: Britains Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Sothebys managing director Guy hopes to secure the listing of a £6.5million 14-bedroom, five-acre Grade II listed manor house mega home onto his books. Aston Tirrold in Oxfordshire boasts six reception rooms, a tennis court and a huge outdoor pool, and has been home to the same family since 1975. Broker Kenrick heads to Camden, north London, to try to secure the listing of an uber-modern glass building apartment with three bedrooms, three bathrooms and a 900-square-ft roof terrace

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Britain is at war, and Emma frantically searches for a way to keep her businesses afloat. She has an ingenious plan, but its a huge gamble. Meanwhile, the men in Emmas life decide whether to sign up and risk their lives for their country. When a guilt-ridden Edwin enlists, Adam is willing to do anything to stop him, even prising open the past. In the 1970s, Paula and Emma are reunited as Paula rushes to warn her grandmother of a surprise twist in the coup against her

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: The war rages on. Emma is a widow and a single mother; business is failing and an unlikely alliance could be her only lifeline. In the 1970s, Emma returns home to Yorkshire for her 80th birthday party, armed with a cunning plan to outmanoeuvre her traitorous children, but another unseen betrayal is on the cards

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: A steam engine enthusiast embarks on an ambitious coast-to-coast journey across Devon, travelling across the countys rolling hills in an 80-year-old steamroller with a top speed of eight miles per hour. Farmers on Dartmoor rear a rare breed of sheep, while at Falmouth, a group of free divers explores a spectacular underwater cave

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Newmarket to find unexpected items in Margarets shed to make some cash for her local foodbank

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Warren struggles to trust his estranged brother Jenson. Diane makes a decision as her family struggle with her prognosis. A resident is forced to reveal the truth. And with things looking up, Donny proposes to Misbah, but its not long before their bubble bursts. Meanwhile, Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. A relationship is on the rocks. Froggy supports his grandson. Donny visits a former flame. And a mother is horrified by what she overhears... Writers: Gareth Lemon, James Coleman, Colin ODonnell; Dirs: Kerri McLean, David Crowley; Prod Co: Lime PicturesShort: Warren struggles to trust Jenson. Diane makes a decision. Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. And Donny proposes to Misbah, but its not long before their bubble bursts...

programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane quits as a waitress at the bar in an attempt to prove she could get a better job if she wanted. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Andy, the former prisoner who Sam arranged as a blind date for Diane, returns to the bar and recruits the barmaid to help him develop a career as an actor

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Dianes ex-fiance shows up at the bar and invites her to dinner in the hope of winning her back. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert asks Ray and Debra to help with his criminal psychology course by taking IQ tests - but gives them misleading results to gauge their reactions

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra becomes jealous of a waitress who catches Rays eye. Although the situation is perfectly innocent, the couple soon blow everything out of all proportion

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank has some anecdotes published in a magazine, sowing the seeds of grand writing ambitions. He approaches Rays editor about becoming a columnist, but finds his way with words leaves a lot to be desired. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: In this homage to the film Sliding Doors, two possible versions of the shrinks Valentines Day unfold - one in which a waitress captures his heart and one where he spends a lonely night at home. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles puts Daphne on a diet, unaware she has secret stashes of food hidden all over the place. Roz tries a new perfume guaranteed to have a devastating effect on men, while Frasier sets out to save station manager Kennys marriage - only to end up dating his wife

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles attends a Seattle SuperSonics basketball game with Frasier, where he is plucked out of the crowd at random and offered a big cash prize to sink a half-court shot. David Hyde Pierce stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz asks Frasier to narrate her documentary on the history of space travel - but he makes such a hash of it she ends up getting rid of him and recruiting former astronaut John Glenn instead. Meanwhile, Niles tries to relive his childhood by entering a kite-flying competition

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jeans Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chefs attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentists waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit an East Midlands reclamation yard, where they find a Russian motorbike and sidecar dating back to the Second World War and a 1970s fire surround

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: The presenter makes a feeding station for the sheep on his mothers farm, while she moves the rapidly growing ducklings to an outside pen. The family start building an adventure playground for their pygmy goat herd out of recycled materials, and Nicola and Molly plant lavender for the bees

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Loretta and Carl from Leicester hope to find the perfect holiday home in the seaside resort of Mojácar in south-east Spain. With busy and stressful jobs, they want a bolthole in the sun where they can relax and unwind whenever they like. Laura Hamilton shows them five options within their £100,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Couple Paul and Fiona try to finish off their very lengthy renovations in France, while in Spain, new BandB owners Tom and Terry take stock and make plans. In Portugal, couple Leah and Joao try to break into Albufeiras busy cocktail bar scene

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Donna and Paul race to finish a risky new floor, six metres up, in Brittany, while Terry and Ashley gamble on their most lavish suite yet at Château de Lalacelle. At Château de la Grillère, Sharon and Tim race against time to complete their tower suite

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: As work on the upper level of the house finally finishes, the builders move onto the basement. But the dust, noise and stress start to take their toll, and just as Jon recovers from his broken leg and thrombosis, he has another major health setback, leaving the family wondering if the build is really worth it

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Our Welsh Chapel Dream
programme.desc: Keith Brymer Jones and his partner Marj Hogarth finally move into their 163-year-old chapel on Wales Llyn Peninsula - but the hard work is far from over as they get stuck into the next stage of the renovation, from clearing the stacks of unwanted items and creating spaces for guests to transforming the Sunday school into Keiths pottery studio. But first they must throw a gigantic pottery and vintage clothes sale to raise much-needed funds

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Pete and Aey order a factory-built house to be constructed in Wales and transported to their rural West Sussex plot, where they plan to demolish an older property to make way for the new one. But there are two big problems - the old house is home to hibernating bats, and moving five gigantic modules down tiny lanes from Wales to Sussex is not going to be easy

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Its the final, and just one hunt stands between the four remaining players and a prize of up to £100,000. But the last hunt comes with a fiendish twist and big-money challenges, meaning the players must deploy every ounce of skill, speed and determination to stay in the game

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sixty six-year-old Carol is rushed to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after a lighter ignited her oxygen-breathing tank, causing flash burn injuries to her face. Though chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and heart and lung failure mean she doesnt have long to live, Carol is determined to be there for her daughters wedding. After a full life and a career in the RAF, Trevor woke one morning to find that he was blind. He seeks help after falling down a flight of stairs at home. Plus, 71-year-old Grace is assisted after tripping and injuring her knee

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Race Across the World, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Last One Laughing, Secrets of the Bees, Just One Thing and Celebrity Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson is joined by 25 year-old Lauren, a movie buff and professional online gamer from Camberley who is looking for a geeky gamer to be her perfect player two so she can reboot her love life after three years of being single. Ryan who is 28 and from Cheltenham, is looking for his Mr Right. As a sucker for a silver fox and a dad bod, can he find his dream guy to wake up to every morning?

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Chelsea and George seek out a threesome with a woman, but will it help Chelsea move past Georges sexually adventurous past and infidelity? Jess and Ben host a naked dinner party, but Bens insecurities and Jesss social anxiety threaten to jeopardise their hopes of inviting married couple Olivia and Gage back for some intimate time in the bedroom

programme.title: The Last Leg
programme.desc: Adam Hills, Josh Widdicombe and Alex Brooker are joined by Josh Pugh, Lorraine Kelly and Steve Bracknall for a comic review of the significant moments of the past seven days. As usual, the hashtag #isitok paves the way for the gang to round up, examine and explain the leading and most entertaining news stories of the week

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete, beginning with Esther and Darryl, who fight for control in the kitchen. Next up are Louise and David, who aim to impress with their Welsh-themed evening, and give a revealing insight into their private lives. The contestants expect an extravagant party on the final night, which is hosted by Carl and Brian, before the winners of the £1,000 prize are announced

programme.title: Kirsties Fill Your House for Free
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp comes to the rescue of Dave and Kate, whose house has been flooded

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George takes on a 17th-century, Grade II listed thatched cottage in Warwickshire. Anthony, a builder, and Emily, a physiotherapist, are determined to turn this rather ramshackle build into their family home. But they may have bitten off more than they can chew

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: When a classy customer falls for Carla, no one can work out why shes not interested. It transpires she is convinced that in order to find her attractive, he must have some fatal flaw. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.desc: One of Sams old friends bets he can break off his romance with Diane inside 24 hours - and starts by revealing he still has his infamous little black book packed with the phone numbers of gorgeous girls

programme.desc: A businessman running for mayor of New York saves the life of an orphan, and invites her to live with him as a publicity stunt. The tycoons cynical nature is chipped away at by the youngsters sunny disposition. Meanwhile, her cruel foster mother hatches a kidnapping plot. Musical remake, starring Quvenzhane Wallis, Jamie Foxx, Cameron Diaz and Rose Byrne

programme.title: Womens FA Cup
programme.desc: Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur (Kick-off 1.30pm). Jill Scott is joined by Maisie Adam to present live coverage of the quarter-final at Kingsmeadow. Chelsea will go into this tie as strong favourites, having won the last 13 Womens Super League matches between the sides and lifted this trophy last term, but Spurs are enjoying a good season so far and will be looking for an upset

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps Maria, who works in administration, and Paul, a retired police officer, who have been holidaying in southern Spain regularly to escape the English winters. Now, they want to find a property that feels like a home away from home among the countryside and traditional pueblos blancos of Andalusia

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Documentary following British families as they renovate French chateaux. At Château de la Boutinière, Alison and Zion race to restore a chapel thats lain untouched for 30 years in time for a couples 60th anniversary celebrations. At Château de Montespieu, newbies Louisa and Roger take on a bold revival of their towering six-turreted home

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With so many delays to the renovation, Jasmine and Jon need an architect to advise them on what they can and cant do. Now that Jon is able to work on the build again, he attempts to fix the swimming pool - with mixed success. But even with everyone rolling up their sleeves, theyll need more help if theres any chance of being ready for their summer deadline

In Newcastle, GP Kathleen and her anaesthetist husband Tom have a three-bedroom Victorian semi in disorganised chaos with Toms sporting gear taking root everywhere. Should they move on or reconfigure the downstairs?

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Puppies Poppy and Fizz struggle with kennel life and may need to be separated if they hope to find a new home. Moose the Staffy might be more than most families can handle

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 76-year-old man sustains a head injury after falling down some stairs, and his daughter reflects on how his caring for her mother through her dementia has left him exhausted. programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Britain is at war, and Emma frantically searches for a way to keep her businesses afloat. She has an ingenious plan, but its a huge gamble. Meanwhile, the men in Emmas life decide whether to sign up and risk their lives for their country. When a guilt-ridden Edwin enlists, Adam is willing to do anything to stop him, even prising open the past. programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: The war rages on. Emma is a widow and a single mother; business is failing and an unlikely alliance could be her only lifeline. programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: A steam engine enthusiast embarks on an ambitious coast-to-coast journey across Devon, travelling across the countys rolling hills in an 80-year-old steamroller with a top speed of eight miles per hour. programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.sub-title: Rachel Nickell: 16 Year Hunt for Justice
programme.desc: The circumstances surrounding the murder of 23-year-old Rachel Nickell in July 1992, when she was attacked and killed in front of her two-year-old son Alex on Wimbledon Common. Colin Stagg was originally charged with the murder, but was eventually acquitted in September 1994 before the case went cold. With more advanced and refined forensic techniques available, Scotland Yard later reopened the investigation and in December 2008 Robert Napper - already serving time in prison for another killing - pleaded guilty to Nickells manslaughter

While Jonathan focuses on reclaiming space, Drew searches for a new nest for them to call home. Short:Frank and Diana live in a million-dollar district, but their fixer-upper is far from fancy. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Dan Duffy, the Chief Executive of United Real Estate Group, adopts a disguise to go undercover in his own company. Dan meets many different employees to learn about their professional standards and also their personal lives.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. The head chefs attitude to quality control is driving customers away, and it is up to Gordon Ramsay to turn the business around

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw-ups?Nurse Jenna and firefighter Neil are ready to settle down in a home of their own. But first, they need to sell his frat house. While a crew of firefighters pitch in to tackle the demolition, theres an electrical upgrade shock. Can the place be revived and smoke out the real estate competition? Short:Nurse Jenna and firefighter Neil need to sell his frat house before they can settle down in their own home. Can the place be revived and smoke out the competition?

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: There are consequences when Jared and Kyle argue, Cat struggles to find her place on the yacht and the exterior wrestle with a difficult docking, while Eileen gets under everyones skin. A night in the hot tub has long-lasting repercussions

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson take on Lee Mack and Katherine Ryan in the comedy words-and-numbers game, while the Brett Domino Trio join Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts, as Sean Lock and Harry Hill take on Jon Richardson and Rosie Jones. Mr Swallow, aka Nick Mohammed, is in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark has a go at online gaming and live role-play with Dobby, and wonders whether she may be the one for him. He and Sophie sort out their annulment, while Jeremy joins a cult. Award-winning comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark and Jeremy enjoy their final days of freedom before Sophies baby is born, determined to ignore the fact that one of them is the father. Mark makes the most of his extra wealth and power after being promoted, spending money on the flat, trying to get Jeremy a job, and pursuing company IT girl Dobby - but his plans go awry during a routine fire drill. Starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: The team helps Lisa, who took her love for Yorkshire puddings a step too far, Ben, whose big boy boasting tattoo isnt a hit with his new girlfriend, and reality TV addict Mike, whose Big Brother-based inking needs to be evicted. Meanwhile, Jay gives Ieuan a tribute to his late sister so that she will always be with him, Alice redecorates Abbies drunken doodle and Sketch gets his hands on Lukes fruity fail

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson take on Lee Mack and Katherine Ryan in the comedy words-and-numbers game, while the Brett Domino Trio join Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Buffalo Wings and Rings president Nader Masadeh goes undercover to work in his own company to ensure his standards are being executed across the brand

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Shawnon Bellah, the chief operating officer of Nestle Toll House Cafe by Chip, goes undercover in her own company. Ever since Shawnon came on board, the firm has been expanding its franchise locations at a rapid pace. She wants to ensure that as they grow, they arent losing the quality and consistency that has made their brand so profitable

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sales administrator Millie from Newquay says she has exhausted the local dating pool and is hoping to find herself the perfect partner. Sheffield window cleaner Alex was bullied in his teens for being overweight. He has trained hard to get a body he is proud of and now he is looking for someone who feels the same. Anna Richardson invites them both to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, whose bodies are revealed one section at a time

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The love restaurant opens its doors once more. Party boy Danny from Essex wants to leave his fun-loving ways behind and find a special woman to settle down with. But when he sits down with straight-talking hairdresser Lauren, he might have had a little too much Dutch courage. High-heel wearing Paolo is back for a second shot at love, meeting fellow Italian Mario, while single mum Claire is hoping Jordanian-born care worker and fellow divorcee Fadi might be the soulmate she is looking for

programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Gentlemen, Casualty, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Crufts 2024, Queens and Martin Compstons Norwegian Fling. programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Warren struggles to trust his estranged brother Jenson, Diane makes a decision as her family struggle with her prognosis, and a resident is forced to reveal the truth. With things looking up, Donny proposes to Misbah, but its not long before their bubble bursts. Meanwhile, Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. A relationship is on the rocks, Froggy supports his grandson and Donny visits a former flame. Also, a mother is horrified by what she overhears

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finds herself becoming an overbearing mother when she finds out that Alex has a crush on a boy, and Haleys idea of sisterly advice is not helping matters. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.desc: Three new couples prepare themselves for their first dinner party but, after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A nutrition student hoping to meet a man who is open with his feelings finds she is not used to compliments during a date with a football coach, and has to brush up on her flirting. Elsewhere, two diners bond over their shared love of dogs, a farmer presents his date with a gift of beetroot, and a woman discovers she has met her supposedly blind date before

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip to an amusement park ends in disarray, prompting Homer to question the behaviour of his fellow man - and leading to an invitation for him to join a survivalist group preparing for the end of the world. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure over poor test scores, until it is revealed that one student missed the exam and could potentially save the school with an above-average mark. Unfortunately, that pupil turns out to be Bart - can he pull it out of the bag?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell makes a disturbing discovery following an awkward encounter with an old high-school flame, and wonders whether he unknowingly fathered a child in his straight days. Feeling intellectually inferior to Alex, Phil and Claire try to enjoy a subtitled film, while Jay regrets getting on the wrong side of Gloria

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley, Alex and Luke decide to surprise Phil and Claire with breakfast in bed, only to catch them in a compromising position. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe and Lenny go in pursuit of Carl when he skips town with $200,000 in winnings from a lottery ticket he bought with them. programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Gentlemen, Casualty, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Crufts 2024, Queens and Martin Compstons Norwegian Fling. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The love restaurant opens its doors once more. Party boy Danny from Essex wants to leave his fun-loving ways behind and find a special woman to settle down with. But when he sits down with straight-talking hairdresser Lauren, he might have had a little too much Dutch courage. High-heel wearing Paolo is back for a second shot at love, meeting fellow Italian Mario, while single mum Claire is hoping Jordanian-born care worker and fellow divorcee Fadi might be the soulmate she is looking for

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Liverpool lass Alex sits down for a meal with union rep Sam, and they immediately click over their political beliefs - but she isnt too sure when he reveals his musical preferences. Three-times divorcee Zina meets undertaker to the stars Chris, whose job has so far been the kiss of death. Can he convince her he is a catch? DJ Charli sets Scott her usual test for any potential partner - seeing how he reacts to her friend Pascal, who she always carries round with her - and 33-year-old mummys boy Frank hopes confident gym beauty Nisha will see through his shyness

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Naked Attraction

Will any of the men hidden away behind the screens be open-minded enough for him? Anna Richardson reveals all

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver continues to demonstrate his own brand of fast food by showing viewers how to prepare lamb lollipops, curry sauce, rice and peas, as well as prawn linguini and Sicilian shaved fennel salad

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Lamb Tagine and Chicken Caesar Salad
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates his own brand of fast food, revealing how to prepare lamb tagine, pan-fried aubergine and cumin crunch as well as crispy polenta chicken Caesar salad, each within the space of 15 minutes

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Lamb Kofte and Keralan Veggie Curry
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver continues to demonstrate his own brand of fast food, showing how to prepare lamb kofte, pitta and Greek salad, and shares a recipe for Keralan vegetarian curry, poppadoms, rice and minty yoghurt

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates his own brand of fast food by showing viewers how to prepare two quick recipes. On the latest menu are lamb meatballs, chop salad and harissa yoghurt, plus a chicken salad

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mary explores the roots of her faith through the medium of food, asking how Britain eats its way through Easter, and sharing her own favourite Easter recipes, including hot cross buns, Simnel cake and roast lamb. In this first episode, she discovers the traditions followed by diverse British families and communities during Lent and Good Friday, and the food that brings them together as each prepare for their Easter celebrations

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary explores the foods that bring different communities together on Easter Sunday, the most symbolic and meaningful feast in the Christian calendar. As well as sharing her own family favourites, Mary discovers how the Greek Orthodox community breaks the fast with tsoureki bread, spends a day with Archbishop of York John Sentamu and discovers Filipino and Italian Easter specialities. She also puts on a feast at her local church hall for everyone she has met along the way

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its cake week, and the brand-new batch of bakers tackle mini cakes, a striking sponge and a scaled-down version of a home close to their hearts.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers tackle illusion macarons and a fruity favourite, before unleashing their creativity by making a dramatic 3D mask entirely from biscuits.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are hoping for a Hollywood handshake this week as they tackle bread, the steely-eyed judges speciality. They begin by putting their stamp on a classic pizza, then are asked to make a classic pastry in the technical challenge. For the showstopper, they tackle the decorative Danish sandwich cake the smorgastarta. Who will claim star baker - and who will be hanging up their apron?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers take on three challenges exploring authentic Mexican bakes, as they put their twist on the classic sweet bread pan dulce for the Signature, tackle a Mexican street food staple in the Technical, and make their own showstopping version of the milk-soaked tres leches cake. Which bakers will impress Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas present

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers attempting a trio of sticky challenges. They get all steamed up in the signature, tackle a classic lemon meringue in the technical and for the showstopper are tasked with creating a sponge cake with a surprise inside. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Halloween comes early for the bakers as they tackle a trio of seasonal challenges, including a signature in the form of an apple cake and a moreish technical. For the showstopper, the amateurs are asked to create a piñata perfect for any spooky celebration. Hosted by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas, with Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood deciding who will be leaving this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers are back in the world of desserts for custard week, which sees them serving up floating islands, a summer staple in the technical and a showstopping set gateau that uses custard as the basis. Will any of them prove good enough to win a Hollywood handshake? Hosted by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host as the bakers face pastry week. Each baker must show their vol-au-vent making skills, demonstrate a technical ability in creating a savoury snack and finally craft a showstopping 3D pie-scape depicting their favourite story from childhood. With only four places in the semi-final, who will be leaving the competition for good?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its the semi-final, and the bakers tackle mini charlottes, a vertical technical challenge and a Swedish showstopper. Who will soar into the final

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The finalists have one last chance to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith with their creations in the hope of being crowned 2022 winner. The remaining contestants have to put together the perfect picnic for the signature challenge and create a summer classic for the technical. In the final showstopper challenge, the bakers must make a celebration of the planet

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The chef visits West Yorkshires biggest rhubarb-growing area and cooks his favourite dessert - rhubarb crumble. He also visits the home of JB Priestley, learns a new recipe for lamb karahi in Bradford, and prepares rabbit pie following his mothers recipe

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef travels to the Peak District to visit his favourite formal vegetable garden at Chatsworth House, before crossing the River Severn to sample the delights of Wales, including cawl, Welsh black cattle, Conway mussels and salt marsh lamb

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The celebrated seafood chef begins a culinary romp around Britain, sampling some of the local dishes he holds dear. His journey begins in Lands End, where he goes on a pigeon shoot, before fishing for mackerel on the coast of Falmouth. Culinary highlights include forgotten dishes like pigeon and peas, and clotted cream with langoustine quiche

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The seafood chef continues his culinary tour of Britain, meeting happy pigs on the Isle of Wight, sampling real cider in Somerset and tasting hot peppery watercress from Hampshire before tickling his tastebuds with Thomas Hardys favourite cheese

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree makes cheap and easy dishes that are perfect for mid-week dinners, including slow cooker teriyaki ribs, cheesy rigatoni pepper bake, and Tex-Mex meatballs

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree makes a classic lunch for her husband and the cowboys. She makes them cheeseburger meatloaf, spicy green beans and grab-and-go cow patty cookies

programme.title: Jamies Fish Supper
programme.sub-title: Pan-Seared Trout with Beets and Horseradish Sauce
programme.desc: Chef Jamie Oliver cooks up recipes to inspire fish-lovers to try different and sustainable types of seafood, preparing pan-seared trout with beets and horseradish sauce

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten and Giada De Laurentiis prepare a lobster and potato salad lunch, along with mascarpone and lemon gnocchi with thyme butter sauce

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten prepares a towering chocolate birthday cake with Tyler Florence, and the duo visit the local farming scene to buy some chicken and vegetables

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining home-bakers face a brand new Bake Off challenge, as Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry challenge them to prove their mastery of classics recipes from the Victorian era. The reign of Queen Victoria is thought to have been the period of history that gave birth to modern baking, and for the signature bake, the contestants are asked to produce a game pie, which gives one enthusiastic competitor a chance to use a genuine antique from 1850. Mary sets the bakers to work on a fruit cake from the late 1800s in the technical, creating a finished product covered in sugar paste and marzipan that should resemble a tennis court. Finally, for the showstopper, the competitors must prepare Charlotte Russe, a bavarois, sponge fingers and jelly dessert much-loved by the Victorians, but one that proves tricky to construct at the best of times

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The five remaining bakers tackle patisserie in the quarter-finals, making 24 cream horns for their signature challenge, before creating mokatines for Marys technical bake. For the showstopper, the cooks are challenged to make a religieuse à lancienne - three tiers of choux pastry eclairs filled with creme patissiere and decorated with icing and buttercream. The contestants must produce something that not only looks and tastes good, but also stays standing before judges Mary and Paul cast a critical eye over their efforts. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James Martin is joined by chef Galton Blackiston in Norfolk, and the pair visit Galtons successful fish and chip shop, which inspires James to cook a fish dish on the beach. Later, James heads to Norfolk Lavender to find out why it grows so well in this county and how it is distilled for oil, before making a very special deep-fried soft-boiled egg salad with croutons and bacon

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: The chefs countrywide tour brings him to London, where he stops off for a bite to eat at new restaurant Core owned by Clare Smyth, and visits a knife forge, where he learns the process of making Japanese-style knives. He also heads along the Thames to the village of Bray, home to the Waterside Inn restaurant. Here he catches up with old friends Michel Roux Sr and his son Alain

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: The murder of Frank Rodriguez, orchestrated in September 2000 by his wife Angelina who hoped to collect $250,000 from his life insurance. At first the cause of death was inconclusive, but as a cause was required to collect the money, Angelina claimed to have received an anonymous phone call advising her Frank had been poisoned with antifreeze. When it was proven no such call had been received and an autopsy verified the details as correct, it became clear she had incriminated herself

programme.sub-title: Wine, Women and War - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Steve tries to retrieve secret papers from a yacht, but someone beats him to it. Lee Majors and Britt Ekland star

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An ambitious detective tries to frame one of Hookers friends in connection with a gang of jewel thieves. Guest starring Jerry Lee Lewis

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex and Trivette become imprisoned by a former adversary who is seeking revenge

programme.title: Alive (1993)
programme.desc: A plane carrying a college rugby team smashes into a mountain in the Andes, leaving the survivors stranded in unbearably bleak conditions. As supplies dwindle, they are faced with the horrifying prospect of eating their dead to ensure they make it through the ordeal. Fact-based drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Vincent Spano and Josh Hamilton

programme.title: How I Spent My Summer Vacation (2012)
programme.desc: A getaway driver crashes his car in Mexico, leading to the authorities seizing his ill-gotten gains and condemning him to a violent, lawless prison dominated by gangs. A boy who has also been locked up there proves an unlikely ally in helping him survive, and he hatches a plan to escape and recover his money. Crime thriller, starring Mel Gibson and Kevin Hernandez

programme.title: The Family (1970)
programme.desc: After being double-crossed by his mistress, a hit-man sets out to take his revenge on the woman and the mob boss who put her up to it. Thriller, starring Charles Bronson

programme.title: The Witches (1966)
programme.desc: A teacher goes to Africa to work at a missionary school, but has a traumatic encounter with a local witch doctor that drives her to a nervous breakdown. She returns to teach in a quiet English village, only to suspect a coven of witches is performing dark rituals - a claim that leads people to suspect she is going mad. Hammer horror, starring Joan Fontaine and Kay Walsh

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex and Trivette become imprisoned by a former adversary who is seeking revenge

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Jonathan and Ruth examine a motorcyclist who cant feel his legs after he collided with a car. A dentistry student evacuated out of the Middle East has shocking shrapnel wounds, and Dr Tsung fears that she may lose her eye. Meanwhile, doctors Manny and Scott must quickly reset the shoulder of an apprentice electrician who has losing the feeling in his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors are concerned that 38-year-old Stacie may be paralysed following a fall from a tree at a friends all-night party, while 19-year-old veterinary student Ashleigh is rushed into AandE after being involved in a high-speed head-on car crash. Elsewhere, Peter, 78, arrives at Kings with abdominal pains, and as he receives treatment, he paints a picture of his eventful life

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britains busiest AandE departments at Kings College Hospital in south London. Its Red Nose Day, but theres little to laugh about for 33-year-old Dilson, who is rushed in with knife wounds to his head and neck after being attacked outside a nightclub. Meanwhile, 79-year-old Doreen has broken her wrist in a fall at home, and parents Keeley and Michael are concerned by the fact their toddler Cydney hasnt urinated for two days

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Midway through their tour of the Scottish Highlands, Sean and Marie, Jen, Ian and Ellis, and Simon and Emmy pitch up at Ben Nevis Holiday Park, at the foot of the famous landmark

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Gemma turns an old TV cabinet into a luxury dog bed, while Henry trades in his lifelong love of mechanicals to upcycle wooden furniture

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien visit Oxford to meet Rosemary, whose father owned a second-hand goods shop. They discover a servants call bell and a mysterious pedal-powered tool, which Simon is anxious to restore

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Carly Cornwalls Juniperlea Inn in Midlothian. Straight away, her guests are taken aback by the stylish decor. However, a roadside location leaves Barney with a sleepless night. At feedback time, Carlys shocked to find out that one guest wouldnt return to her BandB

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at Starshinezzz in County Durham, where laid-back host Dave Taylor hopes his renowned hospitality will make him a winner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests are charmed by Barney Smiths Hobbit-style accommodation at the Hideaway at Baxby Manor in North Yorkshire - although the loos are not quite what they expected

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Hideout Hotel in Hull, run by Jodie Richardson and Enya Donohoe, is the final destination of the week. The hands-off check-in and self-catered apartments prove popular with some guests, but Barney kicks up a stink in the bathroom. During the DIY breakfast, Jodies handling of a smoky situation sets alarm bells ringing for Carly and Lydia, and feedback leaves the hosts fired up with payment day looming

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, Carly from the Juniperlea Inn is keen for Barney to enlighten her on the reasons behind his sleep issues. Barney is in the spotlight again when his payment to Jodie and Enya makes tensions run high. There are plenty of differences to be debated before the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition comes from Blackpool and Preston, where the first host, 26-year-old student and barmaid Rachel, plans an American diner-themed menu. Its a menu that confuses her guests, but they all agrees that her hosting rocks

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lady of leisure Jill is second to host in and around Blackpool and Preston, leaving no stone unturned in her effort to impress her guests with an Italian-themed menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cabin crew member Mark throws the third dinner party of the week, hoping to impress his guests with an evening of fine dining and first class hosting

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Parole officer Bernard takes over hosting duties in Blackpool and Preston, hoping to woo his guests with a combination of northern soul and delicious grub. But a squabble over the starter results in a walk-out during the main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final day in Blackpool and Preston and health assistant Lisa is banking on her no-faff menu to bag the cash. However, its not going to be easy, especially after the criticisms that have been free-flowing across the week. Home truths are revealed and temperatures soar, especially when Bernard gets the shock of his life as hes labelled boring, and he in turn tells Mark that he has been a drama queen. Lisa realises she needs to act quickly to change the atmosphere or risk losing out on the prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Woburn Sands, Buckinghamshire, where self-confessed novice Toni Kupitz runs Woodleys Farmhouse. Engaged couple Ian and Karen get bugged out by a surprise in their bedroom, while sisters Georgie and Frankie are excited about their immaculate bathroom. After an arty day out, BandB veteran Ian rattles some cages over dinner, by revealing his extensive hospitality background

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eddie and Karen Deighton host their rivals at Finch Cottage in Wilsford cum Lake, Wiltshire. They pride themselves on providing a personal experience, but the lack of TVs in the rooms is a big turn-off for some guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third destination is the Bell Inn in Thorpe-le-Soken, Essex, where hospitality manager Ian Hawthorne and his fiancee Karen Hunt are confident they can satisfy their guests. But Frankie is less than pleased by the view from her room and one pair of guests are still in a bad mood over their feedback earlier in the week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sisters Georgie Monaghan and Frankie Gallies Frasers Guest House in Battlesbridge, Essex, is the final stop of the weeks competition. Frasers boasts a unique location in an antiques district, but some guests are left questioning whether the mattresses are heirlooms too when they discover a few unappealing stains. After spending the day exploring an antiques yard, Georgie and Frankie treat their guests to milkshakes at their family-run diner. Talk soon turns to payment day, making for a tense end to the evening

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last day of the competition sees the BandBers eager to challenge each other about the feedback theyve received, as Toni from Woodleys Farmhouse wants to know how she can improve her breakfast service. When one pair accuses another of game playing, things start to get emotional before the winning BandB is announced.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp goes property hunting in the trendy suburb of Heaton in Newcastle, to help Tom and Liz find a new home as they are tired of renting flats. Elsewhere, Phil Spencer is in the Tyne Valley searching for a family home for couple Michael and Sorrel, who only have two months left in their current rental property

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer head to Warwickshire to help Gill and John, a couple who cant agree what to do with their inherited two-bedroom home. With two growing children, John cant see this house ever working and hopes that a move closer to town will appeal to the kids as they become teenagers but Gills fond memories of her mum and the countryside on their doorstep mean that she cant imagine living anywhere else. Faced with a challenging layout, a long list of requirements and soaring build costs, Kirstie needs to find a solution with her £150,000 love-it budget. Meanwhile, Phil has a tricky task convincing Gill to list it but is determined to find three spectacular houses with enough space for the whole family, in an area with plenty going on

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: Builder Richard grapples with the challenge of moving oak ceiling beams into position while, over at Ravenseat, Clive picks up the tweezers to get his sheep looking their best for the sales. An incredible discovery could reveal a wealth of information about Anty Johns 19th-century resident Anthony Clarkson. And, as winter draws in, the building is finally scaffolding-free

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The trauma team at St Georges Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Former boxer Paul, 22, has been stabbed in the face and arm with a broken bottle outside a nightclub in Kingston. As the team works to stop the bleeding and treat the patients wounds, his girlfriend Naveena reflects on his sensitive side. Angela, 93, is brought to AandE by her daughter Elizabeth after suffering from blood loss and disorientation at her care home, while 70-year-old John arrives with his wife Francesca after falling while out running and dislocating his shoulder. To get Johns pain under control quickly the medics give him ketamine, and the hallucinogenic side effects keep everyone entertained

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics in the East Midlands race to free Valerie from her car after it was t-boned by a lorry. In Norwich, the medics rush to the aid of 15-year-old Henry whos fallen 20 feet when a large kite dragged him off his feet into the air, and medics suspect Ellana may have a serious head injury after a road traffic collision in Leicester trapped her in her vehicle

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The trauma team at St Georges Hospital in south-west London fights to save the life of a young woman involved in a motorbike accident, which has completely severed her right leg below the knee. An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks campers arrive at Dalraddy Holiday Park on a traditional Scottish estate at Aviemore. Without leaving the site, campers Jen, Ian and Ellis, Sean and Marie, and Emmy and Simon take a train ride, enjoy some quirky Highland games and battle it out on the paintballing field

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry and Simon head to Pembrokeshire to meet mechanic James, whose family have a stack of sheds crammed with classic cars, motorbikes and tractors, including a 1928 Model A Ford

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Suffolk to meet friends John and Jane who have been collecting and swapping items for many years

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Carl Insley and best friend Sharon are the hosts at Driftwood Luxury Lodges in Dale Abbey in Derbyshire, where they offer a luxury glamping experience. The stylish home-made furniture is a hit, although one camper notices it might not be very practical, and while the continental breakfast is a hit with one couple, others find it hard to swallow

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Grantham Arms in Boroughbridge, North Yorkshire, run by Simon Wade, who is joined in the competition by his right-hand man Joe Graves. Their guests are immediately dazzled by the decor, and the good vibes continue on a day out to a mystical cave. At breakfast, everyone is in awe of Joes hosting. However, Simon and Joe are puzzled by some snippy feedback about their room prices

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers head to Southport, where husband and wife Rick and Sarah Blaney run the Stamford. However, things do not get off to a great start when Annelies and Claudia are left out in the cold by the self check-in

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother-and-daughter team Annelies and Claudia Richardson host the weeks last visit at the Fauconberg Arms in Coxwold, North Yorkshire. Their ethos is that food is just as important as the rooms, but this threatens to prove their downfall when Rick and Sarah have reservations about cleanliness

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On Payment Day, Carl is keen to quiz Simon and Joe over their breakfast woes, while Rick and Sarah want to know why they were scored so badly for their hosting skills. Meanwhile, Annelies and Claudia from the Fauconberg Arms want to wipe the slate with Sarah and Ricks cleanliness critique

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal assistant Lisa hosts the first of five parties from in and around Birmingham, with the 53-year-old self-proclaimed domestic goddess hoping a menu straight from her Malaysian roots will impress other contestants Akil, Sonia, Martha and Mark

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is day two of the competition in Birmingham, and 37-year-old shopping channel producer Martha is hoping to educate - as well as entertain - her guests with a vegan feast

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mark hosts the third night of the culinary competition taking place in Birmingham, hoping to impress his guests with a menu of classic comfort food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Youth worker Sonia is in charge on day four in Birmingham and after three nights of vegan chat from Martha, the host makes a pact with the others to ban any mention of the subject

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final day of the competition in Birmingham sees 32-year-old aquarium designer Akil act as host, hoping to create a splash with his fish-themed menu. With a home-made seafood tempura to start and a double whammy of sea bass and scallops for the main, Akil goes all out to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition begins in Abersoch, north Wales, at NightSky Glamping, run by Angie Howarth and her daughter Caitlin. Things get off to a good start when Sophie and her fiance Sam lap up the luxury in their safari tent - especially the hot tub - and Morgan falls in love with the view. However, some dusty decorations disappoint Kadir. After a trip to the beach for an afternoon of bodyboarding, Morgan reveals that he isnt a fan of camping

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Johnny Doughs Restaurant with Rooms in Conwy, north Wales, run by Morgan Austin. Angie and Caitlin are stunned by the sights, but a hairy bed gets Kadirs stay off on the wrong foot. The guests are whisked off on a boat trip to enjoy Conwy from the water. As well as loving the landscape, they get a peek into host Morgans surprising past

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Royal Oak in the Peak District, run by Kadir Ustun, is the weeks third location. Kadir prides himself on the warm welcome he provides, but mould in their respective bathrooms puts off two sets of guests straight away. Fortunately for Kadir, spirits are lifted after a day out caving at a local attraction - the interestingly named Devils Arse. The next day, the BandBers are divided over breakfast, with some raving about it while others are left disappointed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sam Harrison and Sophie Germany host the final visit of the week at the Dovecote Inn in Nottinghamshire. Morgan marvels at his room, but Kadir is determined to inspect every nook and cranny after receiving frosty feedback from Sam and Sophie when he hosted. An underwhelming day out touring the village of Laxton is saved only by the hosts personalities, though later two of the BandBers have a disagreement over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On payment day, Angie and Caitlin are keen to get to the bottom of some cutlery quibbles. Morgans upset about some cleanliness complaints, while Kadir thinks some of his fellow BandBers have been unfair by saying they wouldnt return to his BandB

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp searches for a family home around Hove on the south coast of England for Duncan, Anna and their three children, as they return from seven years living in Switzerland. Elsewhere, Phil Spencer helps couple Mick and Bernie look for a property to downsize to when they retire in the South Downs

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Carl and Katy decide whether to renovate or sell their three-bedroom Victorian semi-detached home in Chester. Carl thinks moving somewhere new with more space for their two children and to work from home that is more energy-efficient would be the best choice, but Katy is convinced they can solve all their problems with a roof-raising renovation

programme.title: Great Estates from Above
programme.desc: Following head gardener at Penshurst Place, Tony, through the seasons as he looks after one of the oldest privately owned gardens in the country. And theres a look around the estates 50-year-old toy museum

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Paul, 38, is rushed into resus after falling 25ft. He is experiencing shooting pains in his back and pins and needles in his feet, leading to concerns he may have injured his spine. Meanwhile, 66-year-old Anthony, who has recently been diagnosed with Parkinsons disease and prostate cancer, has taken a tumble down a flight of stairs at home. Hes very frail and a scan reveals he has broken some ribs, puncturing a lung

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics fly to the aid of mountain biker Rob in the Cumbrian mountains. Off-road motorbiker Dean is set to miss his friends 50th birthday celebrations after taking a nasty tumble. Plus, 15-year-old Robbie needs urgent care when he falls from a coastal cliff in South Shields

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics battle to keep 48-year-old Paul alive as he suffers a series of heart attacks. Rogers emergency stop halts his day at a scooter rally while, in Cumbria, theres a dramatic mountainside rescue for seriously injured cyclist Nick

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tree surgeon Paul, 38, is rushed into resus after falling 25ft. He is experiencing shooting pains in his back and pins and needles in his feet, leading to concerns he may have injured his spine. programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: With their tour of the Highlands drawing to a close, the campers head for Scotlands northern coast, pitching up at Barrow Campsite near Nairn. Having visited five campsites, its time for Sean and Marie, Simon and Emmy, and Ian, Jen and Ellis to pick this weeks perfect pitch. But first - theres some paddleboarding, beach yoga and campfire cocktails to enjoy

An 11-year-old boy is brought in after having a prolonged epileptic seizure, and a 19-year-old arrives with a sewing needle stuck in her foot, but she seems more keen on taking advice from her mum in Bulgaria than from the doctor

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. Teacher Dave, 53, has facial injuries after riding his new bicycle into the back of a stationary car in Richmond Park, while 30-year-old adrenaline junkie and former Royal Marine Richard has badly dislocated his thumb after falling off a bike

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Medics battle to keep 48-year-old Paul alive as he suffers a series of heart attacks. Rogers emergency stop halts his day at a scooter rally while, in Cumbria, theres a dramatic mountainside rescue for seriously injured cyclist Nick

programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Suffolk to meet friends John and Jane who have been collecting and swapping items for many years

programme.desc: Carl Insley and best friend Sharon are the hosts at Driftwood Luxury Lodges in Dale Abbey in Derbyshire, where they offer a luxury glamping experience. The stylish home-made furniture is a hit, although one camper notices it might not be very practical, and while the continental breakfast is a hit with one couple, others find it hard to swallow

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Grantham Arms in Boroughbridge, North Yorkshire, run by Simon Wade, who is joined in the competition by his right-hand man Joe Graves. Their guests are immediately dazzled by the decor, and the good vibes continue on a day out to a mystical cave. At breakfast, everyone is in awe of Joes hosting. However, Simon and Joe are puzzled by some snippy feedback about their room prices

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hoteliers head to Southport, where husband and wife Rick and Sarah Blaney run the Stamford. However, things do not get off to a great start when Annelies and Claudia are left out in the cold by the self check-in

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother-and-daughter team Annelies and Claudia Richardson host the weeks last visit at the Fauconberg Arms in Coxwold, North Yorkshire. Their ethos is that food is just as important as the rooms, but this threatens to prove their downfall when Rick and Sarah have reservations about cleanliness

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On Payment Day, Carl is keen to quiz Simon and Joe over their breakfast woes, while Rick and Sarah want to know why they were scored so badly for their hosting skills. Meanwhile, Annelies and Claudia from the Fauconberg Arms want to wipe the slate with Sarah and Ricks cleanliness critique

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal assistant Lisa hosts the first of five parties from in and around Birmingham, with the 53-year-old self-proclaimed domestic goddess hoping a menu straight from her Malaysian roots will impress other contestants Akil, Sonia, Martha and Mark

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is day two of the competition in Birmingham, and 37-year-old shopping channel producer Martha is hoping to educate - as well as entertain - her guests with a vegan feast

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mark hosts the third night of the culinary competition taking place in Birmingham, hoping to impress his guests with a menu of classic comfort food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final day of the competition in Birmingham sees 32-year-old aquarium designer Akil act as host, hoping to create a splash with his fish-themed menu. With a home-made seafood tempura to start and a double whammy of sea bass and scallops for the main, Akil goes all out to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The latest competition begins in Abersoch, north Wales, at NightSky Glamping, run by Angie Howarth and her daughter Caitlin. However, some dusty decorations disappoint Kadir. After a trip to the beach for an afternoon of bodyboarding, Morgan reveals that he isnt a fan of camping

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Johnny Doughs Restaurant with Rooms in Conwy, north Wales, run by Morgan Austin. Angie and Caitlin are stunned by the sights, but a hairy bed gets Kadirs stay off on the wrong foot. The guests are whisked off on a boat trip to enjoy Conwy from the water. As well as loving the landscape, they get a peek into host Morgans surprising past

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Royal Oak in the Peak District, run by Kadir Ustun, is the weeks third location. Kadir prides himself on the warm welcome he provides, but mould in their respective bathrooms puts off two sets of guests straight away. Fortunately for Kadir, spirits are lifted after a day out caving at a local attraction - the interestingly named Devils Arse. The next day, the BandBers are divided over breakfast, with some raving about it while others are left disappointed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sam Harrison and Sophie Germany host the final visit of the week at the Dovecote Inn in Nottinghamshire. An underwhelming day out touring the village of Laxton is saved only by the hosts personalities, though later two of the BandBers have a disagreement over dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: The story of historys most notorious pirate, Blackbeard. Born Edward Teach in England, he was an 18th century pirate who operated around the West Indies and the eastern coast of Britains North American colonies. He gained momentum through the Caribbean, before blockading Charleston and fighting a bloody battle

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: The voyages and exploits of Anne Bonny and Mary Read, who formed a troublesome trio with Calico Jack. Together they successfully robbed ships and lived off the spoils of the sea before being eventually captured by pirate hunters and tried for piracy

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: The voyages and exploits of Bartholomew Roberts, aka Black Bart, the most successful pirate of the Golden Age. His piracy almost brought West Indies trade to a standstill until he was hunted down by the English crown

programme.title: The Endurance
programme.desc: The Endurance recounts one of the historys greatest tales of survival, Sir Ernest Shackletons 1914-1916 expedition to Antarctica. The expedition, Shackletons third, followed the tragic death of the famous English polar explorer Robert Falcon Scott on his quest to the South Pole. Narrated by Liam Neeson

programme.title: Everest: The South West Face
programme.desc: An in depth look at Chris Boningtons 1975 expedition to climb the South West face of Mt Everest and put the very first British mountaineers on the summit. In the face of overwhelming odds, dwindling oxygen supplies, freezing Jet Stream winds, avalanche, frostbite, widespread public negativity and the press reporting that failure was almost inevitable - a British team succeeded - where all others had failed

programme.title: Women Under Hitlers Flag
